content:
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1354754985119846581/1474031067223822428

Speaking personally:

Morimens has always been a small, close community. Seeing hurt feelings among creators who’ve contributed so much to this project has been genuinely disheartening. And I have to be honest: much of this could have been prevented with better guidance and moderation from us.

Even though the team is still on holiday break, we held an emergency discussion today to make our stance clear and official:

We do not welcome, and we will not tolerate, disrespect toward other people or their work within our official community — and we absolutely will not tolerate harassment or personal attacks.

These rules have been in our community guidelines for a long time, but we haven’t enforced them consistently. Part of that is because we’ve been stretched thin focusing on development. Part of it is because resolving conflicts properly requires time, investigation, and care. For those reasons, we’ve tried to step in as little as possible. But I’ve been reflecting, and I believe that approach was a mistake.

With upcoming updates to our community moderation rules, we hope to slowly rebuild a space that feels kind, safe, and reliable for everyone.

The truth is, this game is complex and multilayered. Even within the design team, we often disagree — sometimes sharply — on creative decisions. But for this world to move forward, we have to listen openly and constructively. We have to engage with respect, acknowledge perspectives we missed, share different viewpoints, and refine our understanding together to reach a shared vision. It’s not easy.

I do hope creators in this community can work together the same way. It’s an idealistic goal. But ideals are worth fighting for — and this one is worth all of us striving toward together. <:gamekey:1448943277117145140>

说说自己的心里话：

忘却前夜有一个不大却很珍贵的社区，看到为这里付出过重要贡献的创作者之间产生不快，我们真的很失落。而冷静下来我也清楚，很多矛盾本可以通过我们更早、更主动的社区氛围引导与管理去避免。

所以今天，即便脑缸组仍在传统节日假期，我们还是立刻展开了紧急讨论，并向大家正式、明确地表态：

我们不欢迎、也不容忍在官方社区里，出现对他人或他人创作不尊重的行为，更绝对不能容忍任何形式的人身攻击。

这些规则其实早已写在社区须知中，但过去我们执行得太少。一方面是团队精力几乎全部投入版本开发，人手本就有限；另一方面，处理社区冲突需要大量时间去调查、求证、沟通，出于这些现实考量，我们此前一直希望尽量减少介入。

但现在我必须反思：这种选择或许本身就是错误的。希望在新版社区管理规则落地后，我们能一点点重建起友善、让人安心、可以依靠的社区氛围。

其实这款游戏本身就足够复杂多元，哪怕是设计团队内部，在很多设计思路上也很难完全一致，有时观点甚至截然相反。但为了让这个世界往更好的方向走，我们必须学会开放、建设性地倾听彼此，在尊重的基础上，看见对方没考虑到的地方，分享不同视角的见解，再慢慢完善认知、形成新的共识。这一点非常难。

我真心希望，社区里的每一位创作者，都能以这样的态度彼此协作。这听起来或许很理想主义——但正因为是理想，才格外珍贵，才值得我们所有人一起，认真去靠近、去守护。<:gamekey:1448943277117145140>
